name: 05-30-stage2-rvv-computed-mask-segment2-load-store-update-selected-body-realization-migration
title: Stage2 RVV computed-mask segment2 load/store/update selected-body realization migration
description: Move computed-mask segment2 load/store/update behind the RVV selected-body realization producer and remove direct pre-realized route-entry authority from the production path. The realized body must preserve computed mask use, lane policy, memory roles, runtime param binding, and artifact ABI order, and unsupported or inconsistent inputs must fail closed with targeted diagnostics.
creator: codex
